assessment.note: Avoiding high-ambiguity forums to avoid sounding underprepared signals a strong growth constraint and mild pullback in engagement.

new_queue.label: Ambiguity forums
new_queue.name: High-ambiguity forums — what about them makes you feel underprepared?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific fear or capability gap behind avoiding visible ambiguous settings.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Named ambition
new_queue.name: What kind of design work would make the next step feel real for you?
new_queue.description: Gets beyond vague ambition to the specific scope or outcomes he wants next.

new_queue.label: Air cover needed
new_queue.name: What kind of air cover would let you take a more visible position?
new_queue.description: Explores the manager support needed to step into more public strategic ownership.

new_queue.label: Tradeoff check
new_queue.name: What would you need to stop doing to make room for stronger design leadership?
new_queue.description: Forces a real trade-off between current execution load and higher-leverage leadership work.

new_queue.label: First commitment
new_queue.name: What is the one growth move you want to make before we meet again?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete commitment without introducing a new thread.
